<!--
  Thanks for contributing to q-ring. Keep PRs focused; one logical change per PR.
  CI (check + CodeQL analyze) and 1 approval are required before merge on develop/main.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change, and why? -->

## Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Chore / CI / deps

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm run lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm run build` passes
- [ ] `pnpm run test:ci` passes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (for user-facing changes)
- [ ] Docs / README updated if behavior changed
- [ ] CLI ↔ MCP parity kept (if a command or tool was added/changed)

## Breaking changes

<!-- None — or describe the impact and migration steps. -->
